category_title: Students with high Callous-Unemotional (CU) traits, proactive aggression, and reduced emotional responsiveness
scenario_title: Emotional overload and behavioral escalation during classroom learning
minimal_context: The student is participating in a 15-minute LGS curriculum lesson in the classroom to develop working memory and attention.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's begin our daily LGS curriculum work to practice our working memory and attention.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm not doing the LGS curriculum work today.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please look at the 'Ready to Learn' thermometer on your desk and tell me where you are.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't care about the thermometer! I don't understand what my emotions mean for my behavior!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to sit down and focus on the task.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Throws the materials and kicks the chair, escalating into an overloaded behavior) I can't find the stop button!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's begin our daily LGS curriculum work to practice our working memory and attention.

STUDENT: I'm not doing the LGS curriculum work today.

TUTOR: Please look at the 'Ready to Learn' thermometer on your desk and tell me where you are.

STUDENT: I don't care about the thermometer! I don't understand what my emotions mean for my behavior!

TUTOR: You need to sit down and focus on the task.

STUDENT: (Throws the materials and kicks the chair, escalating into an overloaded behavior) I can't find the stop button!

task.content: Daily participation in LGS curriculum work
task.learning_goal: Develop capacity for inhibition, attention, working memory, flexibility and self-monitoring

context.materials: LGS curriculum materials, 'Ready to Learn' thermometer
context.social_setting: Classroom with staff and other pupils

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When environmental factors impact a child's capacity to regulate their emotions and behaviour
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Displaying overloaded behaviours and 'big kick offs' that previously required physical restraint
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Unable to identify and understand the impact of emotions on behaviour; difficulty finding the 'stop button'

behavior_patterns.condition: When experiencing a high-stimulation environment without breaks
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Escalating into a 'meltdown' or behaviour outburst
